content:
The given code is already correct. It splits the order string into an array of words using whitespace as a delimiter, then further splits each element in this array to separate out the product details and price information.

It uses `get` method from `Map` interface to retrieve the price for a specific product name (productDetails[1]) from the `priceList`. It then converts the order amount (orderData[1]) into an integer and multiplies it by the retrieved price to get the total cost of the order. 

Please note that this code assumes that the priceList is a `Map<String, Integer>` where the key is the product name and the value is the price.
